name: Hamdan v. Rumsfeld
question: May the rights protected by the Geneva Convention be enforced in federal court through habeas corpus petitions? Was the military commission established to try Hamdan and others for alleged war crimes in the War on Terror authorized by the Congress or the inherent powers of the President?
description: A case in which the Court found that the rights given by the Geneva Convention to prisoners of war could be enforced by federal court.
